mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, content, done, todo_date AS todoDate, created_at AS createdAt FROM todo WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND todo_date = CURDATE() ORDER BY done ASC, id DESC

SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, content, done, todo_date AS todoDate, created_at AS createdAt FROM todo WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND todo_date > CURDATE() AND done = false ORDER BY todo_date ASC, id DESC
SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, content, done, todo_date AS todoDate, created_at AS createdAt FROM todo WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND todo_date < CURDATE() ORDER BY todo_date DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todo ( member_id, content, done, todo_date ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{content}, false, #{todoDate} )
